welcome.title: Hi {name}, welcome to the fun side!
welcome.bodyPrefix: As a thank you for registering,
welcome.bodyHighlight: you've earned {points} points to kickstart your journey.
welcome.bodySuffix: If you need a hand, this guided tour will walk you through the key features to help you get started.

step1.title: Your profile at a glance
step1.body: Manage everything from your profile dropdown: track points, coupons, order history, and reviews.

step2.title: Explore our products
step2.body: Navigate product categories in the header to quickly find sticker types that match your needs.

step3.title: Easy product search
step3.body: Use the search icon in the header to find products instantly by name and keyword.

step4.title: You're ready to go!
step4.body: For more information and tutorials, check out our "Getting Started" guide located on the account dropdown panel.
